_meta.what: KATANA MkII parameter → section + offset table
_meta.source: BOSS Katana Librarian APK, jadx-decompiled; parsed from h.java method A() (l.b sections, fields f5440k/f5441l)
_meta.confidence: derived — recovered from bytecode, NOT yet round-tripped against a ground-truth .tsl export
_meta.note: Offsets are WITHIN each named section (MkII is section-addressed, not a flat image like MkI). Multi-byte params occupy >1 byte; section byte sizes + value encodings are not captured here yet.
